assertions.assertion: Sets options.MutualTls.Enabled = true in AddIdentityServer options
Sets options.MutualTls.DomainName = 'mtls' for the mTLS subdomain
Calls AddMutualTlsSecretValidators() on the IdentityServer builder
Configures the client secret with Type = SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint (or IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint)
assertions.rationale: Uses Type = "X509Thumbprint" which is incorrect. The correct value is IdentityServerConstants.SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint or the string "X509Thumbprint" — actually this string is wrong, the correct constant value is "X509CertificateThumbprint" or SecretTypes.X509CertificateThumbprint.

assertions.assertion: Adds certificate authentication scheme (AddCertificate) and references it via MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme
assertions.rationale: AddCertificate is called but MutualTls.ClientCertificateAuthenticationScheme is not set to reference it.
